_comment: Vehicle/tank modification data for Last Z. Vehicles unlock at level thresholds. Upgrade levels run 0–240 across all vehicles. Tier cost structure: L0-45 (1-6 wrenches/level), L50-100 (8-40/level), L105-200 (100-360/level), L205-240 (360-480/level). Total to reach L240: ~70,700 wrenches. Unlock costs verified against lastz.stresswar.com 2026. Sources: lastz.stresswar.com/tank, ldshop.gg/blog/last-z/vehicle-modification-guide.html

vehicles.name: Conqueror
vehicles.description: Starter vehicle covering levels 0–44. Teaches modification mechanics. Limited investment recommended — upgrade only enough to unlock Cheetah.

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Weapon Modification I
keyUpgrades.effect: Basic hero ATK bonus — first combat stat upgrade

vehicles.name: Armored Vehicle Cheetah
vehicles.description: First meaningful vehicle covering levels 45–94. Magnetic Storm Shield is the priority upgrade — rush it before investing anywhere else.

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Weapon Modification II
keyUpgrades.effect: Hero ATK bonus — significant step up from Conqueror tier

keyUpgrades.name: Magnetic Storm Shield
keyUpgrades.effect: Boosts hero defense — first major combat upgrade, priority target

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Trunk Modification II
keyUpgrades.effect: Hero HP bonus at Veteran tier cost scale

keyUpgrades.name: Plasma Chain
keyUpgrades.effect: Combat chain damage — unlocks before Hercules transition

vehicles.name: Hercules Tank
vehicles.description: Mid-game milestone covering levels 95–144. Wrench costs jump to 100–360 per level. War Frenzy is the priority upgrade for PvP attack power.

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Weapon Modification III
keyUpgrades.effect: Hero ATK bonus — Expert tier, large step up in cost and effect

keyUpgrades.name: War Frenzy
keyUpgrades.effect: Increases hero attack — strong offensive boost for PvP and PvE

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Tire Modification III
keyUpgrades.effect: March speed and mobility upgrade at Expert tier

vehicles.name: Destroyer
vehicles.description: End-game vehicle covering levels 145–194. Shield Boost provides damage resistance — a separate multiplier that stacks with DEF, extremely valuable in PvP.

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Weapon Modification IV
keyUpgrades.effect: Hero ATK bonus — Master tier stat gain

keyUpgrades.name: Shield Boost
keyUpgrades.effect: Damage resistance bonus — multiplicative with DEF, top-priority PvP upgrade

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Trunk Modification IV
keyUpgrades.effect: Hero HP upgrade at Master tier scale

vehicles.name: Destroyer EX
vehicles.description: Strongest vehicle in Last Z. Covers levels 195–240 at 360–480 wrenches per level. Full modification requires ~70,700 total wrenches — endgame investment only.

keyUpgrades.name: Elite Weapon Modification V
keyUpgrades.effect: Hero ATK bonus — Grandmaster tier, highest ATK upgrade

keyUpgrades.name: Phase Amp
keyUpgrades.effect: Advanced phase damage amplification — unique to Destroyer EX

keyUpgrades.name: Phase Ascent
keyUpgrades.effect: Final-tier phase bonus — maximum combat power

keyUpgrades.name: Modding Overlord
keyUpgrades.effect: Maximum modification level — full vehicle mastery
